bb9d2ab83bf41939: Recognizing the unchanging self present throughout all states of consciousness brings strength and liberation.
b9e6c6f4411abe56: Recognizing the same universal self in all beings brings liberation from the cycle of rebirth.
173fa3dcb26cd656: Powers that enable worldly effects mistake their own capacity for the true source of causation.
43efaea771099dbd: The ultimate manifests in response to correct misapprehension about power and agency.
6d0682ff3863b4b4: Fire is sent to investigate and comprehend the ultimate mystery.
5190c35149d1bdf6: Fire identifies itself through its own distinctive power and nature.
87a9ae66ba44112e: Each power understands its own domain as all-encompassing within the world.
7f8e0933f6953c1a: Even the greatest particular power cannot touch or affect the ultimate mystery.
d404a1e2f8aaa9c4: Wind is then sent to investigate the ultimate source.
85c41ede09d44542: Wind identifies itself through its own capacity and nature.
e3f109d3a47cf860: Wind boasts of its power to move all things on earth.
70fc2a0cd92c8b2b: Wind cannot grasp the ultimate—no cosmic force can comprehend what transcends all particularity.
b98406e67faf23a7: Even consciousness itself cannot apprehend the ultimate—it transcends direct approach or comprehension.
db9a25042d144140: The ultimate reveals itself through beauty and mysterious forms that defy ordinary recognition.
